metadata.actual:
# Generated by gs-mapper route-policy-scenario-ci-workflow.
# Edit the scenario CI manifest and regenerate this workflow instead of editing by hand.
name: 'Smoke Route Policy Scenario CI'

on:
  workflow_dispatch: {}
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - 'main'

jobs:
  route-policy-scenario-shards:
    name: Route policy shard ${{ matrix.shardId }}
    runs-on: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - jobId: 'scenario-smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001'
            shardId: 'smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001'
            scenarioSetPath: 'sample-artifacts/shards/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.json'
            scenarioCount: 1
            reportDir: 'ci/reports/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001'
            runOutput: 'ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.json'
            historyOutput: 'ci/histories/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.json'
            cacheKey: 'smoke-route-policy-ci-cache-smoke-route-policy-ci-shards-smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001'
            command: 'gs-mapper route-policy-scenario-set --scenario-set sample-artifacts/shards/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.json --report-dir ci/reports/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001 --output ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.json --history-output ci/histories/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.json --markdown-output ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.md --history-markdown-output ci/histories/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.md --fail-on-regression'
          - jobId: 'scenario-smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002'
            shardId: 'smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002'
            scenarioSetPath: 'sample-artifacts/shards/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.json'
            scenarioCount: 1
            reportDir: 'ci/reports/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002'
            runOutput: 'ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.json'
            historyOutput: 'ci/histories/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.json'
            cacheKey: 'smoke-route-policy-ci-cache-smoke-route-policy-ci-shards-smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002'
            command: 'gs-mapper route-policy-scenario-set --scenario-set sample-artifacts/shards/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.json --report-dir ci/reports/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002 --output ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.json --history-output ci/histories/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.json --markdown-output ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.md --history-markdown-output ci/histories/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.md --fail-on-regression'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -e ".[dev]"
      - name: Run shard
        run: |
          ${{ matrix.command }}
      - name: Upload shard artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: route-policy-scenario-${{ matrix.shardId }}
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: error
          path: 'ci'

  route-policy-scenario-merge:
    name: Merge route policy shard reports
    runs-on: 'ubuntu-latest'
    needs: route-policy-scenario-shards
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -e ".[dev]"
      - name: Download shard artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          pattern: route-policy-scenario-*
          merge-multiple: true
          path: 'ci'
      - name: Merge shard reports
        run: |
          gs-mapper route-policy-scenario-shard-merge --run ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-001.json --run ci/runs/smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002.json --merge-id smoke-route-policy-ci-merge --history-output ci/history.json --output ci/merge.json --fail-on-regression

          - jobId: 'scenario-smoke-route-policy-ci-matrix-direct-shard-002'

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -e ".[dev]"
      - name: Run shard
        run: |
          ${{ matrix.command }}
      - name: Upload shard artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: route-policy-scenario-${{ matrix.shardId }}
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: error

  route-policy-scenario-merge:
